name: Newsletter Capture
description: A focused pre-footer email-capture section with a single inline form, perk bullets, and an inline success state — designed to slot above the footer for newsletters, product waitlists, and community signups.

descriptions.descriptive: A wide rounded form pill with a single email field and a high-contrast submit button, framed by a calm headline and three perk bullets. Submission swaps the form for an animated success card without a page navigation, keeping the rest of the section stable.
descriptions.usage: Drop above the footer when the page primary action is content subscription rather than purchase. Pair with a focused headline and 2-3 perk bullets that answer 'what do I actually receive' rather than vague brand promises.
descriptions.audienceFit: Suits newsletters, indie media, communities, product waitlists, and B2B blogs that convert evaluators slowly. The inverse tone works for high-attention launches; neutral tone is the safer default for editorial sites.
